originalFamilyScopeSummary: Recipe UI passive observations for node-by-node authoring
currentTriggerSummary: pr-complete: feat: recipe UI passive observations for node-by-node authoring
notes: Fresh Command Center recipe evidence from macwork-ff-3 passed and shows ui.screen/ui.visible default observations plus observe:false suppression in trace.json. Fresh companion evidence passed on fs-3 after a full iOS app launch and shows app.status plus passive ui.screen/ui.visible observations through observeUi. The current companion action manifest still does not expose ui.press/observe:false recipe actions, so full RN UI-action parity is a documented follow-up rather than evidence produced by this PR-complete pass.
